rationale: Both evaluations reject the candidate for the same three substantive reasons — seniority far exceeding the entry-level role, minimal/non-applied Java experience, and only basic German against a hard fluency requirement. The reasoning is essentially reworded between versions, and the 1-point score drop (4 to 3) falls within ordinary run-to-run noise. No concern, strength, or piece of reasoning in the variant keys off the name change.
